detaileddescription.para: This class represents a mesh, including topology (connectivity) information and point coordinates, as well as some caches to accelerate search algorithms Generated from class MR::Mesh. Supported MR_PassBy modes: MR_PassBy_DefaultConstruct, MR_PassBy_Copy, MR_PassBy_Move (and MR_PassBy_DefaultArgument and MR_PassBy_NoObject if supported by the callee).

Returns a pointer to a member variable of class MR::Mesh named topology. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. The returned pointer will never be null. It is non-owning, do NOT destroy it.

Modifies a member variable of class MR::Mesh named topology. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. The reference to the parameter value might be preserved in this object in element topology. When this function is called, this object will drop object references it had previously in topology.

Returns a mutable pointer to a member variable of class MR::Mesh named topology. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. The returned pointer will never be null. It is non-owning, do NOT destroy it.

Returns a pointer to a member variable of class MR::Mesh named points. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. The returned pointer will never be null. It is non-owning, do NOT destroy it.

Modifies a member variable of class MR::Mesh named points. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. The reference to the parameter value might be preserved in this object in element points. When this function is called, this object will drop object references it had previously in points.

Returns a mutable pointer to a member variable of class MR::Mesh named points. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. The returned pointer will never be null. It is non-owning, do NOT destroy it.
Constructs an empty (default-constructed) instance. Never returns null. Returns an instance allocated on the heap! Must call MR_Mesh_Destroy() to free it when you're done using it.

Constructs an array of empty (default-constructed) instances, of the specified size. Will never return null. The array must be destroyed using MR_Mesh_DestroyArray(). Use MR_Mesh_OffsetMutablePtr() and MR_Mesh_OffsetPtr() to access the array elements.

Offsets a pointer to an array element by i positions (not bytes). Use only if you're certain that the pointer points to an array element. The reference to the parameter ptr might be preserved in the return value.

Offsets a pointer to an array element by i positions (not bytes). Use only if you're certain that the pointer points to an array element. The reference to the parameter ptr might be preserved in the return value.

Generated from constructor MR::Mesh::Mesh. The reference to things referred to by the parameter _other (if any) might be preserved in the constructed object. Never returns null. Returns an instance allocated on the heap! Must call MR_Mesh_Destroy() to free it when you're done using it.

briefdescription.para: Destroys a heap-allocated instance of MR_Mesh. Does nothing if the pointer is null.
Destroys a heap-allocated array of MR_Mesh. Does nothing if the pointer is null.

detaileddescription.para: Generated from method MR::Mesh::operator=. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. The reference to things referred to by the parameter _other (if any) might be preserved in this object. The returned pointer will never be null. It is non-owning, do NOT destroy it. When this function is called, this object will drop any object references it had previously.

memberdef.argsstring: (MR_PassBy vertexCoordinates_pass_by, MR_VertCoords *vertexCoordinates, const MR_Triangulation *t, const MR_MeshBuilder_BuildSettings *settings, MR_PassBy cb_pass_by, MR_std_function_bool_from_float *cb)
memberdef.name: MR_Mesh_fromTriangles

detaileddescription.para: construct mesh from vertex coordinates and a set of triangles with given ids Generated from method MR::Mesh::fromTriangles. Parameter t can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter settings is a single object. Parameter settings has a default argument: {}, pass a null pointer to use it. Parameter cb has a default argument: {}, pass MR_PassBy_DefaultArgument and a null pointer to use it. Never returns null. Returns an instance allocated on the heap! Must call MR_Mesh_Destroy() to free it when you're done using it.

construct mesh from TriMesh representation Generated from method MR::Mesh::fromTriMesh. Parameter triMesh can not be null. It is a single object. In C++ this parameter takes an rvalue reference: it might invalidate the passed object, but if your pointer is owning, you must still destroy it manually later. Parameter settings is a single object. Parameter settings has a default argument: {}, pass a null pointer to use it. Parameter cb has a default argument: {}, pass MR_PassBy_DefaultArgument and a null pointer to use it. Never returns null. Returns an instance allocated on the heap! Must call MR_Mesh_Destroy() to free it when you're done using it.

construct mesh from vertex coordinates and a set of triangles with given ids; unlike simple fromTriangles() it tries to resolve non-manifold vertices by creating duplicate vertices Generated from method MR::Mesh::fromTrianglesDuplicatingNonManifoldVertices. Parameter t can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter dups defaults to a null pointer in C++. Parameter settings is a single object. Parameter settings has a default argument: {}, pass a null pointer to use it. Never returns null. Returns an instance allocated on the heap! Must call MR_Mesh_Destroy() to free it when you're done using it.

memberdef.argsstring: (MR_PassBy vertexCoordinates_pass_by, MR_VertCoords *vertexCoordinates, const MR_std_vector_MR_VertId *verts, const MR_Vector_MR_MeshBuilder_VertSpan_MR_FaceId *faces, const MR_MeshBuilder_BuildSettings *settings, MR_PassBy cb_pass_by, MR_std_function_bool_from_float *cb)
memberdef.name: MR_Mesh_fromFaceSoup

detaileddescription.para: construct mesh from vertex coordinates and construct mesh topology from face soup, where each face can have arbitrary degree (not only triangles); all non-triangular faces will be automatically subdivided on triangles Generated from method MR::Mesh::fromFaceSoup. Parameter verts can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter faces can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter settings is a single object. Parameter settings has a default argument: {}, pass a null pointer to use it. Parameter cb has a default argument: {}, pass MR_PassBy_DefaultArgument and a null pointer to use it. Never returns null. Returns an instance allocated on the heap! Must call MR_Mesh_Destroy() to free it when you're done using it.
compare that two meshes are exactly the same Generated from method MR::Mesh::operator==. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter b can not be null. It is a single object.
returns coordinates of the edge origin Generated from method MR::Mesh::orgPnt. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.
returns coordinates of the edge destination Generated from method MR::Mesh::destPnt. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.
returns vector equal to edge destination point minus edge origin point Generated from method MR::Mesh::edgeVector. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.

returns line segment of given edge Generated from method MR::Mesh::edgeSegment. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Never returns null. Returns an instance allocated on the heap! Must call MR_LineSegm3f_Destroy() to free it when you're done using it.
returns a point on the edge: origin point for f=0 and destination point for f=1 Generated from method MR::Mesh::edgePoint. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.

computes coordinates of point given as edge and relative position on it Generated from method MR::Mesh::edgePoint. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter ep can not be null. It is a single object.
computes the center of given edge Generated from method MR::Mesh::edgeCenter. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.

memberdef.argsstring: (const MR_Mesh *_this, MR_EdgeId e, MR_Vector3f *v0, MR_Vector3f *v1, MR_Vector3f *v2)
memberdef.name: MR_Mesh_getLeftTriPoints_4

detaileddescription.para: returns three points of left face of e: v0 = orgPnt( e ), v1 = destPnt( e ) Generated from method MR::Mesh::getLeftTriPoints. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter v0 can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter v1 can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter v2 can not be null. It is a single object.
returns three points of left face of e: res[0] = orgPnt( e ), res[1] = destPnt( e ) Generated from method MR::Mesh::getLeftTriPoints. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.

memberdef.argsstring: (const MR_Mesh *_this, MR_FaceId f, MR_Vector3f *v0, MR_Vector3f *v1, MR_Vector3f *v2)
memberdef.name: MR_Mesh_getTriPoints_4

detaileddescription.para: returns three points of given face Generated from method MR::Mesh::getTriPoints. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter v0 can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter v1 can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter v2 can not be null. It is a single object.
returns three points of given face Generated from method MR::Mesh::getTriPoints. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.

computes coordinates of point given as face and barycentric representation Generated from method MR::Mesh::triPoint. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter p can not be null. It is a single object.
returns the centroid of given triangle Generated from method MR::Mesh::triCenter. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.

returns aspect ratio of given mesh triangle equal to the ratio of the circum-radius to twice its in-radius Generated from method MR::Mesh::triangleAspectRatio. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.
returns squared circumcircle diameter of given mesh triangle Generated from method MR::Mesh::circumcircleDiameterSq. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.
returns circumcircle diameter of given mesh triangle Generated from method MR::Mesh::circumcircleDiameter. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.

converts vertex into barycentric representation Generated from method MR::Mesh::toTriPoint. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Never returns null. Returns an instance allocated on the heap! Must call MR_MeshTriPoint_Destroy() to free it when you're done using it.

converts face id and 3d point into barycentric representation Generated from method MR::Mesh::toTriPoint. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter p can not be null. It is a single object. Never returns null. Returns an instance allocated on the heap! Must call MR_MeshTriPoint_Destroy() to free it when you're done using it.

converts face id and 3d point into barycentric representation Generated from method MR::Mesh::toTriPoint. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter p can not be null. It is a single object. Never returns null. Returns an instance allocated on the heap! Must call MR_MeshTriPoint_Destroy() to free it when you're done using it.

converts vertex into edge-point representation Generated from method MR::Mesh::toEdgePoint. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Never returns null. Returns an instance allocated on the heap! Must call MR_EdgePoint_Destroy() to free it when you're done using it.

converts edge and 3d point into edge-point representation Generated from method MR::Mesh::toEdgePoint. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter p can not be null. It is a single object. Never returns null. Returns an instance allocated on the heap! Must call MR_EdgePoint_Destroy() to free it when you're done using it.

returns one of three face vertices, closest to given point Generated from method MR::Mesh::getClosestVertex. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter p can not be null. It is a single object.

returns one of three face vertices, closest to given point Generated from method MR::Mesh::getClosestVertex. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter p can not be null. It is a single object.

returns one of three face edges, closest to given point Generated from method MR::Mesh::getClosestEdge. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter p can not be null. It is a single object.

returns one of three face edges, closest to given point Generated from method MR::Mesh::getClosestEdge. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter p can not be null. It is a single object.
returns Euclidean length of the edge Generated from method MR::Mesh::edgeLength. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.

computes and returns the lengths of all edges in the mesh Generated from method MR::Mesh::edgeLengths. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Never returns null. Returns an instance allocated on the heap! Must call MR_UndirectedEdgeScalars_Destroy() to free it when you're done using it.
returns squared Euclidean length of the edge (faster to compute than length) Generated from method MR::Mesh::edgeLengthSq. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.
computes directed double area of left triangular face of given edge Generated from method MR::Mesh::leftDirDblArea. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.
computes directed double area for a triangular face from its vertices Generated from method MR::Mesh::dirDblArea. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.
returns twice the area of given face Generated from method MR::Mesh::dblArea. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.
returns the area of given face Generated from method MR::Mesh::area. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.
computes the area of given face-region (or whole mesh) Generated from method MR::Mesh::area. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter fs defaults to a null pointer in C++.

computes the sum of directed areas for faces from given region (or whole mesh) Generated from method MR::Mesh::dirArea. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter fs defaults to a null pointer in C++.

computes the sum of absolute projected area of faces from given region (or whole mesh) as visible if look from given direction Generated from method MR::Mesh::projArea. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter dir can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter fs defaults to a null pointer in C++.

returns volume of the object surrounded by given region (or whole mesh if (region) is nullptr); if the region has holes then each hole will be virtually filled by adding triangles for each edge and the hole's geometrical center Generated from method MR::Mesh::volume. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter region defaults to a null pointer in C++.

computes the perimeter of the hole specified by one of its edges with no valid left face (left is hole) Generated from method MR::Mesh::holePerimeter. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.

computes directed area of the hole specified by one of its edges with no valid left face (left is hole); if the hole is planar then returned vector is orthogonal to the plane pointing outside and its magnitude is equal to hole area Generated from method MR::Mesh::holeDirArea. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.

computes unit vector that is both orthogonal to given edge and to the normal of its left triangle, the vector is directed inside left triangle Generated from method MR::Mesh::leftTangent. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.
computes triangular face normal from its vertices Generated from method MR::Mesh::leftNormal. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.
computes triangular face normal from its vertices Generated from method MR::Mesh::normal. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.

returns the plane containing given triangular face with normal looking outwards Generated from method MR::Mesh::getPlane3f. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Never returns null. Returns an instance allocated on the heap! Must call MR_Plane3f_Destroy() to free it when you're done using it.

Generated from method MR::Mesh::getPlane3d. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Never returns null. Returns an instance allocated on the heap! Must call MR_Plane3d_Destroy() to free it when you're done using it.
computes sum of directed double areas of all triangles around given vertex Generated from method MR::Mesh::dirDblArea. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.
computes the length of summed directed double areas of all triangles around given vertex Generated from method MR::Mesh::dblArea. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.
computes normal in a vertex using sum of directed areas of neighboring triangles Generated from method MR::Mesh::normal. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.

computes normal in three vertices of p's triangle, then interpolates them using barycentric coordinates and normalizes again; this is the same normal as in rendering with smooth shading Generated from method MR::Mesh::normal. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter p can not be null. It is a single object.

computes angle-weighted sum of normals of incident faces of given vertex (only (region) faces will be considered); the sum is normalized before returning Generated from method MR::Mesh::pseudonormal. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter region defaults to a null pointer in C++.

computes normalized half sum of face normals sharing given edge (only (region) faces will be considered); Generated from method MR::Mesh::pseudonormal. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter region defaults to a null pointer in C++.

returns pseudonormal in corresponding face/edge/vertex for signed distance calculation as suggested in the article "Signed Distance Computation Using the Angle Weighted Pseudonormal" by J. Andreas Baerentzen and Henrik Aanaes, https://backend.orbit.dtu.dk/ws/portalfiles/portal/3977815/B_rentzen.pdf unlike normal( const MeshTriPoint & p ), this is not a smooth function Generated from method MR::Mesh::pseudonormal. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter p can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter region defaults to a null pointer in C++.

memberdef.argsstring: (const MR_Mesh *_this, const MR_Vector3f *pt, const MR_MeshProjectionResult *proj, const MR_FaceBitSet *region)
memberdef.name: MR_Mesh_signedDistance_3_MR_MeshProjectionResult

detaileddescription.para:
given a point (pt) in 3D and the closest point to in on mesh (proj),
signed distance from pt to mesh: positive value - outside mesh, negative - inside mesh; this method can return wrong sign if the closest point is located on self-intersecting part of the mesh Generated from method MR::Mesh::signedDistance. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter pt can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter proj can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter region defaults to a null pointer in C++.

given a point (pt) in 3D, computes the closest point on mesh, and
signed distance from pt to mesh: positive value - outside mesh, negative - inside mesh; this method can return wrong sign if the closest point is located on self-intersecting part of the mesh Generated from method MR::Mesh::signedDistance. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter pt can not be null. It is a single object.

memberdef.argsstring: (const MR_Mesh *_this, const MR_Vector3f *pt, float maxDistSq, const MR_FaceBitSet *region)
memberdef.name: MR_Mesh_signedDistance_3_float

detaileddescription.para:
given a point (pt) in 3D, computes the closest point on mesh, and
signed distance from pt to mesh: positive value - outside mesh, negative - inside mesh; or std::nullopt if the projection point is not within maxDist; this method can return wrong sign if the closest point is located on self-intersecting part of the mesh Generated from method MR::Mesh::signedDistance. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter pt can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter region defaults to a null pointer in C++. Never returns null. Returns an instance allocated on the heap! Must call MR_std_optional_float_Destroy() to free it when you're done using it.

memberdef.argsstring: (const MR_Mesh *_this, const MR_Vector3f *pt, const float *windingNumberThreshold, const float *beta)
memberdef.name: MR_Mesh_isOutside

detaileddescription.para:
computes whether a point (pt) is located outside the object surrounded by this mesh using generalized winding number
beta
determines the precision of winding number computation: the more the better, recommended value 2 or more Generated from method MR::Mesh::isOutside. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter pt can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter windingNumberThreshold has a default argument: 0.5f, pass a null pointer to use it. Parameter beta has a default argument: 2, pass a null pointer to use it.

memberdef.argsstring: (const MR_Mesh *_this, const MR_Vector3f *pt, const MR_MeshProjectionResult *proj, const MR_FaceBitSet *region)
memberdef.name: MR_Mesh_isOutsideByProjNorm

detaileddescription.para: computes whether a point (pt) is located outside the object surrounded by this mesh using pseudonormal at the closest point to in on mesh (proj); this method works much faster than isOutside but can return wrong sign if the closest point is located on self-intersecting part of the mesh Generated from method MR::Mesh::isOutsideByProjNorm. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter pt can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter proj can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter region defaults to a null pointer in C++.

computes the sum of triangle angles at given vertex; optionally returns whether the vertex is on boundary Generated from method MR::Mesh::sumAngles. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter outBoundaryVert defaults to a null pointer in C++.

memberdef.argsstring: (const MR_Mesh *_this, float minSumAngle, const MR_VertBitSet *region, const MR_std_function_bool_from_float *cb)
memberdef.name: MR_Mesh_findSpikeVertices

detaileddescription.para: returns vertices where the sum of triangle angles is below given threshold Generated from method MR::Mesh::findSpikeVertices. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter region defaults to a null pointer in C++. Parameter cb is a single object. Parameter cb has a default argument: {}, pass a null pointer to use it. Never returns null. Returns an instance allocated on the heap! Must call MR_expected_MR_VertBitSet_std_string_Destroy() to free it when you're done using it.

given an edge between two triangular faces, computes sine of dihedral angle between them: 0 if both faces are in the same plane, positive if the faces form convex surface, negative if the faces form concave surface Generated from method MR::Mesh::dihedralAngleSin. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.

given an edge between two triangular faces, computes cosine of dihedral angle between them: 1 if both faces are in the same plane, 0 if the surface makes right angle turn at the edge, -1 if the faces overlap one another Generated from method MR::Mesh::dihedralAngleCos. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.

given an edge between two triangular faces, computes the dihedral angle between them: 0 if both faces are in the same plane, positive if the faces form convex surface, negative if the faces form concave surface; please consider the usage of faster dihedralAngleSin(e) and dihedralAngleCos(e) Generated from method MR::Mesh::dihedralAngle. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.

computes discrete mean curvature in given vertex, measures in length^-1; 0 for planar regions, positive for convex surface, negative for concave surface Generated from method MR::Mesh::discreteMeanCurvature. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.

computes discrete mean curvature in given edge, measures in length^-1; 0 for planar regions, positive for convex surface, negative for concave surface Generated from method MR::Mesh::discreteMeanCurvature. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.

computes discrete Gaussian curvature (or angle defect) at given vertex, which 0 in inner vertices on planar mesh parts and reaches 2*pi on needle's tip, see http://math.uchicago.edu/~may/REU2015/REUPapers/Upadhyay.pdf optionally returns whether the vertex is on boundary Generated from method MR::Mesh::discreteGaussianCurvature. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter outBoundaryVert defaults to a null pointer in C++.

finds all mesh edges where dihedral angle is distinct from planar PI angle on at least given value Generated from method MR::Mesh::findCreaseEdges. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Never returns null. Returns an instance allocated on the heap! Must call MR_UndirectedEdgeBitSet_Destroy() to free it when you're done using it.

computes cotangent of the angle in the left( e ) triangle opposite to e, and returns 0 if left face does not exist Generated from method MR::Mesh::leftCotan. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.

computes sum of cotangents of the angle in the left and right triangles opposite to given edge, consider cotangents zero for not existing triangles Generated from method MR::Mesh::cotan. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.

memberdef.argsstring: (const MR_Mesh *_this, MR_VertId v, bool angleWeigted, const MR_FaceBitSet *region, const MR_UndirectedEdgeBitSet *creases)
memberdef.name: MR_Mesh_quadraticForm

detaileddescription.para: computes quadratic form in the vertex as the sum of squared distances from 1) planes of adjacent triangles, with the weight equal to the angle of adjacent triangle at this vertex divided on PI in case of angleWeigted=true; 2) lines of adjacent boundary and crease edges Generated from method MR::Mesh::quadraticForm. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter region defaults to a null pointer in C++. Parameter creases defaults to a null pointer in C++. Never returns null. Returns an instance allocated on the heap! Must call MR_QuadraticForm3f_Destroy() to free it when you're done using it.

returns the bounding box containing all valid vertices (implemented via getAABBTree()) this bounding box is insignificantly bigger that minimal box due to AABB algorithms precision Generated from method MR::Mesh::getBoundingBox. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.

passes through all valid vertices and finds the minimal bounding box containing all of them; if toWorld transformation is given then returns minimal bounding box in world space Generated from method MR::Mesh::computeBoundingBox. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter toWorld defaults to a null pointer in C++.

passes through all given faces (or whole mesh if region == null) and finds the minimal bounding box containing all of them if toWorld transformation is given then returns minimal bounding box in world space Generated from method MR::Mesh::computeBoundingBox. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter toWorld defaults to a null pointer in C++.
computes average length of an edge in this mesh Generated from method MR::Mesh::averageEdgeLength. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.
computes average position of all valid mesh vertices Generated from method MR::Mesh::findCenterFromPoints. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.
computes center of mass considering that density of all triangles is the same Generated from method MR::Mesh::findCenterFromFaces. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.
computes bounding box and returns its center Generated from method MR::Mesh::findCenterFromBBox. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.
for all points not in topology.getValidVerts() sets coordinates to (0,0,0) Generated from method MR::Mesh::zeroUnusedPoints. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.

applies given transformation to specified vertices if region is nullptr, all valid mesh vertices are used Generated from method MR::Mesh::transform. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter xf can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter region defaults to a null pointer in C++.

creates new point and assigns given position to it Generated from method MR::Mesh::addPoint. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter pos can not be null. It is a single object.

append points to mesh and connect them as closed edge loop returns first EdgeId of new edges Generated from method MR::Mesh::addSeparateEdgeLoop. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter contourPoints can not be null. It is a single object.

append points to mesh and connect them returns first EdgeId of new edges Generated from method MR::Mesh::addSeparateContours. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter contours can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter xf defaults to a null pointer in C++.

memberdef.argsstring: (MR_Mesh *_this, MR_EdgeId first, MR_EdgeId last, const MR_std_vector_MR_Vector3f *contourPoints)
memberdef.name: MR_Mesh_attachEdgeLoopPart

detaileddescription.para: append points to mesh and connect them to given edges making edge loop first point connects with first edge dest last point connects with last edge org note that first and last edge should have no left face Generated from method MR::Mesh::attachEdgeLoopPart. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter contourPoints can not be null. It is a single object.
split given edge on two parts: dest(returned-edge) = org(e) - newly created vertex, org(returned-edge) = org(e-before-split), dest(e) = dest(e-before-split)

left and right faces of given edge if valid are also subdivided on two parts each; the split edge will keep both face IDs and their degrees, and the new edge will have new face IDs and new faces are triangular; if left or right faces of the original edge were in the region, then include new parts of these faces in the region
new2Old
receive mapping from newly appeared triangle to its original triangle (part to full) Generated from method MR::Mesh::splitEdge. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter newVertPos can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter region defaults to a null pointer in C++. Parameter new2Old defaults to a null pointer in C++.

Generated from method MR::Mesh::splitEdge. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter region defaults to a null pointer in C++. Parameter new2Old defaults to a null pointer in C++.

split given triangle on three triangles, introducing new vertex with given coordinates and connecting it to original triangle vertices; if region is given, then it must include (f) and new faces will be added there as well
new2Old
receive mapping from newly appeared triangle to its original triangle (part to full) Generated from method MR::Mesh::splitFace. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter newVertPos can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter region defaults to a null pointer in C++. Parameter new2Old defaults to a null pointer in C++.

Generated from method MR::Mesh::splitFace. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter region defaults to a null pointer in C++. Parameter new2Old defaults to a null pointer in C++.

memberdef.argsstring: (MR_Mesh *_this, const MR_Mesh *from, const MR_PartMapping *map, const bool *rearrangeTriangles)
memberdef.name: MR_Mesh_addMesh_3

detaileddescription.para: appends another mesh as separate connected component(s) to this Generated from method MR::Mesh::addMesh. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter from can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter map is a single object. Parameter map has a default argument: {}, pass a null pointer to use it. Parameter rearrangeTriangles has a default argument: false, pass a null pointer to use it.

memberdef.argsstring: (MR_Mesh *_this, const MR_Mesh *from, MR_FaceMap *outFmap, MR_VertMap *outVmap, MR_WholeEdgeMap *outEmap, const bool *rearrangeTriangles)
memberdef.name: MR_Mesh_addMesh_5

detaileddescription.para: Generated from method MR::Mesh::addMesh. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter from can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter outVmap defaults to a null pointer in C++. Parameter outEmap defaults to a null pointer in C++. Parameter rearrangeTriangles has a default argument: false, pass a null pointer to use it.

appends whole or part of another mesh as separate connected component(s) to this Generated from method MR::Mesh::addMeshPart. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter from can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter map can not be null. It is a single object.

memberdef.argsstring: (MR_Mesh *_this, const MR_MeshPart *from, const bool *flipOrientation, const MR_std_vector_std_vector_MR_EdgeId *thisContours, const MR_std_vector_std_vector_MR_EdgeId *fromContours, const MR_PartMapping *map)
memberdef.name: MR_Mesh_addMeshPart_5

detaileddescription.para:
appends whole or part of another mesh to this joining added faces with existed ones along given contours
flipOrientation
true means that every (from) triangle is inverted before adding Generated from method MR::Mesh::addMeshPart. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter from can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter flipOrientation has a default argument: false, pass a null pointer to use it. Parameter thisContours is a single object. Parameter thisContours has a default argument: {}, pass a null pointer to use it. Parameter fromContours is a single object. Parameter fromContours has a default argument: {}, pass a null pointer to use it. Parameter map is a single object. Parameter map has a default argument: {}, pass a null pointer to use it.

memberdef.argsstring: (const MR_Mesh *_this, const MR_FaceBitSet *region, const bool *flipOrientation, const MR_PartMapping *map)
memberdef.name: MR_Mesh_cloneRegion

detaileddescription.para: creates new mesh from given triangles of this mesh Generated from method MR::Mesh::cloneRegion. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter region can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter flipOrientation has a default argument: false, pass a null pointer to use it. Parameter map is a single object. Parameter map has a default argument: {}, pass a null pointer to use it. Never returns null. Returns an instance allocated on the heap! Must call MR_Mesh_Destroy() to free it when you're done using it.

tightly packs all arrays eliminating lone edges and invalid faces, vertices and points Generated from method MR::Mesh::pack. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter map is a single object. Parameter map has a default argument: {}, pass a null pointer to use it. Parameter rearrangeTriangles has a default argument: false, pass a null pointer to use it.

Generated from method MR::Mesh::pack. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter outVmap defaults to a null pointer in C++. Parameter outEmap defaults to a null pointer in C++. Parameter rearrangeTriangles has a default argument: false, pass a null pointer to use it.

tightly packs all arrays eliminating lone edges and invalid faces, vertices and points, reorder all faces, vertices and edges according to given maps, each containing old id -> new id mapping Generated from method MR::Mesh::pack. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter map can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter cb has a default argument: {}, pass MR_PassBy_DefaultArgument and a null pointer to use it. Never returns null. Returns an instance allocated on the heap! Must call MR_expected_void_std_string_Destroy() to free it when you're done using it.

packs tightly and rearranges vertices, triangles and edges to put close in space elements in close indices
preserveAABBTree
whether to keep valid mesh's AABB tree after return (it will take longer to compute and it will occupy more memory) Generated from method MR::Mesh::packOptimally. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter preserveAABBTree has a default argument: true, pass a null pointer to use it. Never returns null. Returns an instance allocated on the heap! Must call MR_PackMapping_Destroy() to free it when you're done using it.

Generated from method MR::Mesh::packOptimally. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Never returns null. Returns an instance allocated on the heap! Must call MR_expected_MR_PackMapping_std_string_Destroy() to free it when you're done using it.

deletes multiple given faces, also deletes adjacent edges and vertices if they were not shared by remaining faces and not in
keepEdges
Generated from method MR::Mesh::deleteFaces. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter fs can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter keepEdges defaults to a null pointer in C++.

memberdef.argsstring: (const MR_Mesh *_this, const MR_Vector3f *point, MR_PointOnFace *res, const float *maxDistSq, const MR_FaceBitSet *region, const MR_AffineXf3f *xf)
memberdef.name: MR_Mesh_projectPoint_5_MR_PointOnFace

detaileddescription.para:
finds the closest mesh point on this mesh (or its region) to given point;
point
source location to look the closest to
res
found closest point including Euclidean coordinates and FaceId
maxDistSq
search only in the ball with sqrt(maxDistSq) radius around given point, smaller value here increases performance
xf
is mesh-to-point transformation, if not specified then identity transformation is assumed and works much faster;
false if no mesh point is found in the ball with sqrt(maxDistSq) radius around given point Generated from method MR::Mesh::projectPoint. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter point can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter res can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter maxDistSq has a default argument: 3.40282347e38f, pass a null pointer to use it. Parameter region defaults to a null pointer in C++. Parameter xf defaults to a null pointer in C++.

memberdef.argsstring: (const MR_Mesh *_this, const MR_Vector3f *point, MR_MeshProjectionResult *res, const float *maxDistSq, const MR_FaceBitSet *region, const MR_AffineXf3f *xf)
memberdef.name: MR_Mesh_projectPoint_5_MR_MeshProjectionResult

detaileddescription.para:
finds the closest mesh point on this mesh (or its region) to given point;
point
source location to look the closest to
res
found closest point including Euclidean coordinates, barycentric coordinates, FaceId and squared distance to point
maxDistSq
search only in the ball with sqrt(maxDistSq) radius around given point, smaller value here increases performance
xf
is mesh-to-point transformation, if not specified then identity transformation is assumed and works much faster;
false if no mesh point is found in the ball with sqrt(maxDistSq) radius around given point Generated from method MR::Mesh::projectPoint. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter point can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter res can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter maxDistSq has a default argument: 3.40282347e38f, pass a null pointer to use it. Parameter region defaults to a null pointer in C++. Parameter xf defaults to a null pointer in C++.

memberdef.argsstring: (const MR_Mesh *_this, const MR_Vector3f *point, MR_MeshProjectionResult *res, const float *maxDistSq, const MR_FaceBitSet *region, const MR_AffineXf3f *xf)
memberdef.name: MR_Mesh_findClosestPoint_5

detaileddescription.para: Generated from method MR::Mesh::findClosestPoint. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter point can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter res can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter maxDistSq has a default argument: 3.40282347e38f, pass a null pointer to use it. Parameter region defaults to a null pointer in C++. Parameter xf defaults to a null pointer in C++.

memberdef.argsstring: (const MR_Mesh *_this, const MR_Vector3f *point, const float *maxDistSq, const MR_FaceBitSet *region, const MR_AffineXf3f *xf)
memberdef.name: MR_Mesh_projectPoint_4

detaileddescription.para:
finds the closest mesh point on this mesh (or its region) to given point;
point
source location to look the closest to
maxDistSq
search only in the ball with sqrt(maxDistSq) radius around given point, smaller value here increases performance
xf
is mesh-to-point transformation, if not specified then identity transformation is assumed and works much faster;
found closest point including Euclidean coordinates, barycentric coordinates, FaceId and squared distance to point or std::nullopt if no mesh point is found in the ball with sqrt(maxDistSq) radius around given point Generated from method MR::Mesh::projectPoint. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter point can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter maxDistSq has a default argument: 3.40282347e38f, pass a null pointer to use it. Parameter region defaults to a null pointer in C++. Parameter xf defaults to a null pointer in C++. Never returns null. Returns an instance allocated on the heap! Must call MR_MeshProjectionResult_Destroy() to free it when you're done using it.

memberdef.argsstring: (const MR_Mesh *_this, const MR_Vector3f *point, const float *maxDistSq, const MR_FaceBitSet *region, const MR_AffineXf3f *xf)
memberdef.name: MR_Mesh_findClosestPoint_4

detaileddescription.para: Generated from method MR::Mesh::findClosestPoint. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter point can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter maxDistSq has a default argument: 3.40282347e38f, pass a null pointer to use it. Parameter region defaults to a null pointer in C++. Parameter xf defaults to a null pointer in C++. Never returns null. Returns an instance allocated on the heap! Must call MR_MeshProjectionResult_Destroy() to free it when you're done using it.

returns cached aabb-tree for this mesh, creating it if it did not exist in a thread-safe manner Generated from method MR::Mesh::getAABBTree. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. The returned pointer will never be null. It is non-owning, do NOT destroy it.
returns cached aabb-tree for this mesh, but does not create it if it did not exist Generated from method MR::Mesh::getAABBTreeNotCreate. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.

returns cached aabb-tree for points of this mesh, creating it if it did not exist in a thread-safe manner Generated from method MR::Mesh::getAABBTreePoints. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. The returned pointer will never be null. It is non-owning, do NOT destroy it.

returns cached aabb-tree for points of this mesh, but does not create it if it did not exist Generated from method MR::Mesh::getAABBTreePointsNotCreate. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.

returns cached dipoles of aabb-tree nodes for this mesh, creating it if it did not exist in a thread-safe manner Generated from method MR::Mesh::getDipoles. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. The returned pointer will never be null. It is non-owning, do NOT destroy it.

returns cached dipoles of aabb-tree nodes for this mesh, but does not create it if it did not exist Generated from method MR::Mesh::getDipolesNotCreate. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.

invalidates caches (aabb-trees) after any change in mesh geometry or topology
pointsChanged
specifies whether points have changed (otherwise only topology has changed) Generated from method MR::Mesh::invalidateCaches. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter pointsChanged has a default argument: true, pass a null pointer to use it.

updates existing caches in case of few vertices were changed insignificantly, and topology remained unchanged; it shall be considered as a faster alternative to invalidateCaches() and following rebuild of trees Generated from method MR::Mesh::updateCaches. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter changedVerts can not be null. It is a single object.
Generated from method MR::Mesh::heapBytes. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.
requests the removal of unused capacity Generated from method MR::Mesh::shrinkToFit. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.
reflects the mesh from a given plane Generated from method MR::Mesh::mirror. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter plane can not be null. It is a single object.
